Home › Visa Checker › British passport
Passport guide · British

British passport: 161 visa-free destinations

Holders of a United Kingdom passport have easy entry to 161 countries — 118 visa-free and 43 with visa on arrival. Below is the full, sourced list plus e-visa and visa-required countries.

118visa-free
43visa on arrival
18e-visa
19visa required

Visa-free destinations

Countries a British passport holder can enter without arranging any visa in advance. Day-limit shown where available.

  • Albania
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Andorra
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Angola
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Antigua and Barbuda
    Visa-free · 180 days
  • Argentina
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Armenia
    Visa-free · 180 days
  • Austria
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Bahamas
    Visa-free · 240 days
  • Barbados
    Visa-free · 180 days
  • Belarus
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Belgium
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Belize
    Visa-free
  • Bolivia
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Bosnia and Herzegovina
    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 30 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 180 days
  • Estonia
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Fiji
    Visa-free · 120 days
  • Finland
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • France✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK passport holders can travel visa-free to France for up to 90 days in any 180-day period.
    Official source ↗
  • Gambia
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Georgia
    Visa-free · 360 days
  • Germany✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK citizens do not require a visa for tourism in Germany; visa-free stay limited to 90 days within any 180-day period under Schengen rules.
    Official source ↗
  • Greece✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK passport holders can travel visa-free to Greece (Schengen area) for up to 90 days within any 180-day period.
    Official source ↗
  • Grenada
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Guatemala
    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free
  • Israel
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Italy✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK passport holders can enter Italy visa-free for tourism for up to 90 days within any 180-day period.
    Official source ↗
  • Jamaica
    Visa-free
  • Japan✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK passport holders are visa-free for short-term tourism; 90-day visitor exemption stamp issued on arrival.
    Official source ↗
  • Kazakhstan
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Kiribati
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Kosovo
    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 60 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 180 days
  • Malawi
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Malaysia✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK citizens are visa-free; automatic social visit pass granted on arrival for up to 90 days.
    Official source ↗
  • Malta
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Marshall Islands
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Mauritius
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Mexico✓
    Visa-free · 180 days
    UK passport holders enter visa-free for tourism and may stay up to 180 days; valid passport required.
    Official source ↗

    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Moldova
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Monaco
    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 30 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 30 days

    Visa-free · 90 days

    Visa-free · 90 days
    British passport holders do not require a visa to visit the Netherlands; visa-free entry permitted for up to 90 days within any 180-day period.

    Visa-free · 15 days

    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Seychelles
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Singapore✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK passport holders can enter Singapore visa-free for tourism; stay normally permitted between 30-90 days at immigration officer's discretion.
    Official source ↗
  • Slovakia
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Slovenia
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • South Africa
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • South Korea✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK passport holders are visa-free for up to 90 days; K-ETA exemption extended through 31 December 2026; e-arrival card required.
    Official source ↗
  • Spain✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK passport holders can visit visa-free for up to 90 days within any 180-day period; passport must be valid for at least 3 months beyond departure.
    Official source ↗
  • Swaziland
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Sweden
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Switzerland✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK passport holders do not require a visa for tourist stays up to 90 days in any 180-day period within the Schengen area.
    Official source ↗
  • Taiwan
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Thailand✓
    Visa-free · 60 days
    UK passport holders can enter Thailand visa-free for up to 60 days; proof of return travel required.
    Official source ↗
  • Trinidad and Tobago
    Visa-free
  • Tunisia
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Turkey✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK ordinary passport holders are exempt from visas for up to 90 days in any 180-day period for tourism.
    Official source ↗
  • Ukraine
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • United Arab Emirates✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    Free visa upon arrival valid for 90 days within a 180-day rolling period; no advance application required.
    Official source ↗
  • Uruguay
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Uzbekistan
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Vanuatu
    Visa-free · 120 days
  • Vatican
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Venezuela
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Vietnam
    Visa-free · 45 days
  • Zambia
    Visa-free · 90 days

Visa on arrival

Visa issued at the border — typically quick, fee-paid, and no embassy visit required. Still bring passport photos, proof of onward travel, and hotel bookings.

  • Bahrain
    Visa on arrival
  • Bangladesh
    Visa on arrival
  • Burkina Faso
    Visa on arrival
  • Burundi
    Visa on arrival
  • Cambodia
    Visa on arrival
  • Comoros
    Visa on arrival
  • Djibouti
    Visa on arrival
  • Egypt
    Visa on arrival
  • Ethiopia
    Visa on arrival
  • Ghana
    Visa on arrival
  • Guinea-Bissau
    Visa on arrival
  • Indonesia✓
    Visa-free · 30 days
    30-day Visa on Arrival obtainable at major airports and ports for 500,000 Indonesian Rupiah; alternatively apply for e-visa online.
    Official source ↗
  • Iraq
    Visa on arrival
  • Ivory Coast
    Visa on arrival
  • Jordan
    Visa on arrival
  • Kenya
    Visa on arrival
  • Kuwait
    Visa on arrival

    Visa on arrival

    Visa on arrival

    Visa on arrival

    Visa on arrival

    Visa on arrival

    Visa on arrival

    Visa on arrival

    Visa on arrival
  • Tuvalu
    Visa on arrival
  • Zimbabwe
    Visa on arrival
  • Canada✓
    Visa-free · 180 days
    UK citizens need an electronic travel authorization (eTA) to board flights to Canada; costs CAD $7 and is valid for up to 5 years. Valid for stays up to 6 months.
    Official source ↗
  • United States✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    UK passport holders eligible for Visa Waiver Program; require ESTA approval before travel; maximum 90-day stay.
    Official source ↗

e-Visa destinations

Apply online before you travel. Usually approved within a few days, cheaper and faster than an embassy visa.

  • Australia✓
    Visa-free · 90 days
    eVisitor visa required; apply online before travel for up to 3-month stays.
    Official source ↗
  • Azerbaijan
    e-Visa
  • Benin
    e-Visa
  • Bhutan
    e-Visa
  • Cameroon
    e-Visa
  • Cuba
    e-Visa
  • DR Congo
    e-Visa
  • Equatorial Guinea
    e-Visa
  • Gabon
    e-Visa
  • Guinea
    e-Visa
  • India
    e-Visa
  • Libya
    e-Visa
  • Myanmar
    e-Visa
  • Nigeria
    e-Visa
  • South Sudan
    e-Visa
  • Syria
    e-Visa
  • Togo
    e-Visa
  • Uganda
    e-Visa

Visa required — 19 destinations

embassy visa needed · click to expand

These destinations require a full visa from an embassy or consulate in advance. Entries marked ✓ have been re-verified against an official government source.

  • Afghanistan
    Visa required
  • Algeria
    Visa required
  • Central African Republic
    Visa required
  • Chad
    Visa required
  • China
    Visa required
  • Congo
    Visa required
  • Eritrea
    Visa required
  • Honduras
    Visa required
  • Iran
    Visa required
  • Liberia
    Visa required
  • Mali
    Visa required
  • Nauru
    Visa required
  • Niger
    Visa required
  • North Korea
    Visa required
  • Russia
    Visa required
  • Sudan
    Visa required
  • Suriname
    Visa required
  • Turkmenistan
    Visa required
  • Yemen
    Visa required

Expand your access with a residence permit

If your British passport has limited reach, a residence permit can unlock many additional destinations. Pairing your passport with one of the permits below typically adds 5–15 new visa-free or visa-on-arrival countries:

  • UAE residence permit — strong for South Asian passport holders, unlocks Armenia, Georgia, Azerbaijan, Serbia
  • US Green Card — unlocks Mexico, Canada (via eTA), several Caribbean and Central American countries
  • Schengen residence permit — unlocks Turkey, Balkans, several visa-free short stays across the EU

Frequently asked questions

How many countries can British passport holders visit visa-free?
British passport holders have visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to approximately 161 countries — 118 visa-free and 43 visa-on-arrival. Notable visa-free destinations include Albania, Andorra, Angola, Antigua and Barbuda, Argentina.
Is the British passport strong?
Yes — the British passport is considered strong, giving access to 161+ destinations without needing to arrange a visa in advance.
Do I need an ETA or e-visa for some countries?
Yes. 18 destinations require an e-visa (online application before arrival) for British passport holders. These are typically quicker than embassy visas but still need to be arranged before travel.
Which countries require a full visa in advance?
19 countries require British passport holders to obtain a visa from an embassy before travelling. Check the destination embassy's website for specific requirements and processing times.
Can a residence permit or second visa unlock extra countries?
Yes — several residence permits grant bonus visa-free access regardless of your British passport. See our guides for UAE residence, US Green Card, and Schengen residence permit to learn which countries unlock for each.
How accurate is this list?
Entries marked with a ✓ badge have been re-verified against an official government source (embassy, ministry, or visa portal) and link to that source. Entries without the badge come from the community-maintained open-source Passport Index Dataset — a reasonable starting point but not individually verified. Rules change frequently. Always confirm with the destination embassy before booking travel.
